title: Tatsu
description: Adds various weapons, and cosmetic items.
body:
![Animated Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a4a45c83c3e0684e8234ccd4af2976796b0251a.gif)

Tatsu aims to add various weapons and cosmetic items for you to craft and discover around your world, which have custom models to make your character more unique and interesting. 

Most equipment have custom models, and some even have animations to make them feel truly unique and different.

Currently Tatsu adds 2 Weapons and 1 Hat, but more will be added over time.

![Requires Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e403ea8e76541bc7afe882f8e04ac08e2ae3bbf.png)
